label: Outreach
description: Connect to Outreach to sync prospects, sequences, tasks, and activity data from your sales engagement platform.

form.title: Connect Outreach
form.subtitle: Authorize Anton to access your Outreach account via OAuth 2.0 using your own Outreach OAuth app.

methods.label: Sign in with Outreach (OAuth 2.0)
methods.description: BYOK OAuth 2.0 — register an OAuth app in your Outreach account, paste the client credentials here, and Anton opens a browser window for you to authorize. No passwords stored, revocable from Outreach at any time.
methods.how_to:
## Connect Outreach via OAuth 2.0 (Bring Your Own App)

Outreach does not offer API keys — OAuth 2.0 is the only supported auth method. You need to register a custom OAuth app in Outreach first.

### 1. Create an OAuth app in Outreach

1. Log in to Outreach and go to **Settings → Apps → Your apps** (or visit `https://app.outreach.io/apps/`).
2. Click **Create new app**.
3. Set **Application name** to something like `Anton`.
4. Under **Redirect URIs**, add `http://localhost` (Anton uses a local redirect during the OAuth flow).
5. Under **Scopes**, enable the ones you need — at minimum: **Accounts**, **Prospects**, **Sequences**, **Users**, and **Tasks**.
6. Save the app. Outreach displays your **Application ID** (client ID) and **Secret**.

### 2. Paste credentials into Anton

1. Copy the **Application ID** into the **Client ID** field below.
2. Copy the **Secret** into the **Client Secret** field below.
3. Click **Submit**. Anton opens your browser to the Outreach consent screen.
4. Log in with your Outreach credentials and click **Authorize**.
5. Anton exchanges the authorization code for a refresh token and stores it locally.

### Notes

- The **Secret** is shown once in Outreach. Copy it immediately — if you lose it, regenerate a new one and re-paste it here.
- To revoke access, go to **Outreach → Settings → Apps → Authorized apps** and remove the Anton entry.
- Scopes must be granted at the app level AND accepted during the consent screen — if you add scopes later, re-authorize.

fields.name: client_id
fields.label: Client ID
fields.description: The Application ID from your Outreach OAuth app — found at Settings → Apps → Your apps.

fields.name: client_secret
fields.label: Client Secret
fields.description: The Secret paired with your Application ID. Shown only once by Outreach — copy it immediately when creating the app.
